---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or report issues in the docs
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## What needs improvement?
Describe what documentation is missing, unclear, outdated, or incorrect.

## Where is it?
Link to the page/section (or file path + heading).

## Proposed change
What would you like to see changed or added?

## Additional context
Anything else that might help (screenshots, examples, etc.).
